attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.REFRESH_DATETIME,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.LOCATION_ID,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.CREATION_DATE,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.CREATED_BY,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.REQUEST_ID,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.PROGRAM_ID,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.WH_UPDATE_DATE,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE1,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE2,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE3,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE4,
  REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE (CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE5, '[^!-.*{},#&!/\/a-z|A-Z|0-9| ]', NULL),CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '),
  REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE (CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE6, '[^!-.*{},#&!/\/a-z|A-Z|0-9| ]', NULL),CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '),
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE7,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE8,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE9,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE10,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE11,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE12,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE13,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE14,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE15,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE16,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE17,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE18,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE19,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE20,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ORIG_SYSTEM_REFERENCE,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.COUNTRY,
  REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE (CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS1, '[^!-.*{},#&!/\/a-z|A-Z|0-9| ]', NULL),CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '),
  REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE (CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS2, '[^!-.*{},#&!/\/a-z|A-Z|0-9| ]', NULL),CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '),
  REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE (CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS3, '[^!-.*{},#&!/\/a-z|A-Z|0-9| ]', NULL),CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '),
  REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE (CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS4, '[^!-.*{},#&!/\/a-z|A-Z|0-9| ]', NULL),CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '),
  REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE (CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.CITY, '[^!-.*{},#&!/\/a-z|A-Z|0-9| ]', NULL),CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '),
  REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE (CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.POSTAL_CODE, '[^!-.*{},#&!/\/a-z|A-Z|0-9| ]', NULL),CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '),
  REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE (CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.STATE, '[^!-.*{},#&!/\/a-z|A-Z|0-9| ]', NULL),CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '),
  REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE (CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.PROVINCE, '[^!-.*{},#&!/\/a-z|A-Z|0-9| ]', NULL),CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '),
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.COUNTY,
  REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE (CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS_KEY, '[^!-.*{},#&!/\/a-z|A-Z|0-9| ]', NULL),CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '),
  REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REGEXP_REPLACE (CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS_STYLE, '[^!-.*{},#&!/\/a-z|A-Z|0-9| ]', NULL),CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' '),
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.VALIDATED_FLAG,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS_LINES_PHONETIC,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.APARTMENT_FLAG,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.PO_BOX_NUMBER,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.HOUSE_NUMBER,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.STREET_SUFFIX,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.APARTMENT_NUMBER,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.SECONDARY_SUFFIX_ELEMENT,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.STREET,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.RURAL_ROUTE_TYPE,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.RURAL_ROUTE_NUMBER,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.STREET_NUMBER,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.BUILDING,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.FLOOR,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.SUITE,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ROOM,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.POSTAL_PLUS4_CODE,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.TIME_ZONE,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.OVERSEAS_ADDRESS_FLAG,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.POST_OFFICE,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.POSITION,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.DELIVERY_POINT_CODE,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.LOCATION_DIRECTIONS,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS_EFFECTIVE_DATE,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS_EXPIRATION_DATE,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS_ERROR_CODE,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.CLLI_CODE,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.DODAAC,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.TRAILING_DIRECTORY_CODE,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.LANGUAGE,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.LIFE_CYCLE_STATUS,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.SHORT_DESCRIPTION,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.DESCRIPTION,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.CONTENT_SOURCE_TYPE,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.LOC_HIERARCHY_ID,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.SALES_TAX_GEOCODE,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.SALES_TAX_INSIDE_CITY_LIMITS,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.FA_LOCATION_ID,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.CREATED_BY_MODULE,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.APPLICATION_ID,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.TIMEZONE_ID,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.GEOMETRY_STATUS_CODE,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.ACTUAL_CONTENT_SOURCE,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.VALIDATION_STATUS_CODE,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.DATE_VALIDATED,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.DO_NOT_VALIDATE_FLAG,
  CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS.GEOMETRY_SOURCE
FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS
WHERE SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND
AND SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME   <=
  (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_HZ_LOCATIONS)

SELECT STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.LOCATION_ID,
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ACTUAL_CONTENT_SOURCE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ACTUAL_CONTENT_SOURCE, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS1,
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS2,
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS3,
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS4, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS_EFFECTIVE_DATE, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS_ERROR_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ADDRESS_ERROR_CODE, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS_EXPIRATION_DATE,
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS_KEY USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) ADDRESS_KEY,
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS_LINES_PHONETIC USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ADDRESS_LINES_PHONETIC,
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ADDRESS_STYLE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ADDRESS_STYLE, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.APARTMENT_FLAG USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)APARTMENT_FLAG,
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.APARTMENT_NUMBER USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)APARTMENT_NUMBER, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.APPLICATION_ID,
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE1 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ATTRIBUTE1, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE10 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ATTRIBUTE10, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE11 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ATTRIBUTE11, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE12 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ATTRIBUTE12, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE13 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ATTRIBUTE13, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE14 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ATTRIBUTE14, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE15 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ATTRIBUTE15, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE16 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ATTRIBUTE16, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE17 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ATTRIBUTE17, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE18 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ATTRIBUTE18, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE19 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ATTRIBUTE19, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE2 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ATTRIBUTE2, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE20 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ATTRIBUTE20,
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE3 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ATTRIBUTE3, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE4 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ATTRIBUTE4, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE5 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ATTRIBUTE5,
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE6 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ATTRIBUTE6, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE7 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ATTRIBUTE7, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE8 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ATTRIBUTE8, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.LOC_HIERARCHY_ID, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE9 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ATTRIBUTE9, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.BUILDING USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)BUILDING,
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.CITY, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.CLLI_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)CLLI_CODE, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.CONTENT_SOURCE_TYPE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)CONTENT_SOURCE_TYPE, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.COUNTRY, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.COUNTY, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.SALES_TAX_GEOCODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)SALES_TAX_GEOCODE, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.RURAL_ROUTE_TYPE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)RURAL_ROUTE_TYPE, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.RURAL_ROUTE_NUMBER USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)RURAL_ROUTE_NUMBER, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ROOM USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ROOM,
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.REQUEST_ID, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.PROVINCE, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.PROGRAM_ID, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.WH_UPDATE_DATE, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.VALIDATION_STATUS_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)VALIDATION_STATUS_CODE, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.VALIDATED_FLAG USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)VALIDATED_FLAG, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.TRAILING_DIRECTORY_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)TRAILING_DIRECTORY_CODE, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.TIME_ZONE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)TIME_ZONE, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.TIMEZONE_ID, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.SUITE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)SUITE, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.STREET_SUFFIX USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)STREET_SUFFIX, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.STREET_NUMBER USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)STREET_NUMBER, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.STREET USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)STREET, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.STATE, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.SHORT_DESCRIPTION USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)SHORT_DESCRIPTION, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.SECONDARY_SUFFIX_ELEMENT USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)SECONDARY_SUFFIX_ELEMENT, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.SALES_TAX_INSIDE_CITY_LIMITS USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)SALES_TAX_INSIDE_CITY_LIMITS,
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.PO_BOX_NUMBER USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)PO_BOX_NUMBER, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.POST_OFFICE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)POST_OFFICE, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.POSTAL_PLUS4_CODE, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.POSTAL_CODE, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.OVERSEAS_ADDRESS_FLAG USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)OVERSEAS_ADDRESS_FLAG, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.ORIG_SYSTEM_REFERENCE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)ORIG_SYSTEM_REFERENCE, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.CREATED_BY, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.CREATED_BY_MODULE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)CREATED_BY_MODULE, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.CREATION_DATE, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.DATE_VALIDATED, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.DELIVERY_POINT_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)DELIVERY_POINT_CODE, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.DESCRIPTION USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)DESCRIPTION, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.DODAAC USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)DODAAC, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.DO_NOT_VALIDATE_FLAG USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)DO_NOT_VALIDATE_FLAG,
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.FA_LOCATION_ID, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.FLOOR USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)FLOOR, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.GEOMETRY_STATUS_CODE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)GEOMETRY_STATUS_CODE, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13,
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.HOUSE_NUMBER USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)HOUSE_NUMBER, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.LIFE_CYCLE_STATUS USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)LIFE_CYCLE_STATUS, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.LOCATION_DIRECTIONS USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)LOCATION_DIRECTIONS, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.GEOMETRY USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)GEOMETRY, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.GEOMETRY_SOURCE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)GEOMETRY_SOURCE, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.LANGUAGE_1 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR)LANGUAGE_1, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.POSITION_1 USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) POSITION_1, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) TRAIL_FILE_NAME, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) SOURCE_DML_TYPE, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, 
STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.REFRESH_DATETIME, 
TRANSLATE(STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.PROCESSED_FLAG USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) PROCESSED_FLAG
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS,
 (
 select LOCATION_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS
 minus
 select LOCATION_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG_HZ_LOCATIONS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.LOCATION_ID = STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.LOCATION_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG_HZ_LOCATIONS.REFRESH_DATETIME
